MNEMONIST-ACCUMULATING_MEMORIES.descript:
Gain {Memory:diff()} [gold]Memory[/gold].
When this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], permanently increase its [gold]Memory[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-ACCUMULATING_MEMORIES.title: Accumulating Memories
MNEMONIST-ACTIVE_RECALL.description: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ACTIVE_RECALL.title: Active Recall
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY.description: At the start of your turn, if you have 20 or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain {AgeBeforeBeautyPower:diff()} [blue]Strength[/blue] and [blue]Dexterity[/blue] until the end of the turn.
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY.title: Age Before Beauty
MNEMONIST-AMNESTIC_BLOW.title: Amnestic Blow
MNEMONIST-ANGER_POINT.description:
Shuffle your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat if you have [blue]{Size}[/blue] or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ANGER_POINT.title: Anger Point
MNEMONIST-BRAIN_BLAST.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
MNEMONIST-BRAIN_BLAST.title: Brain Blast
MNEMONIST-BREADTH_OF_EXPERIENCE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less if you have [blue]{Size}[/blue] or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-BREADTH_OF_EXPERIENCE.title: Breadth Of Experience
MNEMONIST-BURNING_THOUGHTS.title: Burning Thoughts
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION.description: Whenever an [blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal [blue]{CognitiveIgnitionPower:diff()}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION.title: Cognitive Ignition
MNEMONIST-COMFORTING_THOUGHT.title: Comforting Thought
MNEMONIST-CONTEMPLATE.description:
Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of [blue]Engrams[/blue] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])|}
MNEMONIST-CONTEMPLATE.title: Contemplate
MNEMONIST-CRAM_SHEET.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Memory[/gold].
MNEMONIST-CRAM_SHEET.title: Cram Sheet
MNEMONIST-DEEP_THOUGHT.title: Deep Thought
MNEMONIST-DEJA_VU.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}. Put it on the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-DEJA_VU.title: Déjà Vu
MNEMONIST-DOGMATIC_IDEAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies
and gain {Energy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Repeat if your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is empty.
Repeat if your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] is empty.
MNEMONIST-DOGMATIC_IDEAL.title: Dogmatic Ideal
MNEMONIST-ECHOED_FRAGMENTS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], gain {GhostBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ECHOED_FRAGMENTS.title: Echoed Fragments
MNEMONIST-EMPTY_MIND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Repeat if your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is empty.
Repeat if your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] is empty.
MNEMONIST-EMPTY_MIND.title: Empty Mind
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM.description: When drawn, gain 1 [gold]Memory[/gold], draw a card, and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM.title: Engram
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When you draw an [blue]Engram[/blue] while this card is in hand, increase its damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM_STRIKE.title: Engram Strike
MNEMONIST-FORGETFULNESS.title: Forgetfulness
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION.descript: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card during your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for the turn.
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION.title: Forgotten Frustration
MNEMONIST-FRUSTRATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for every [blue]{Size}[/blue] cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-FRUSTRATION.title: Frustration
MNEMONIST-GRUDGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Spend {Memory:diff()} [gold]Memory[/gold] to repeat twice.
MNEMONIST-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
MNEMONIST-HELPFUL_MNEMONICS.description:
Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you draw an [blue]Engram[/blue], gain {HelpfulMnemonicsPower:diff} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-HELPFUL_MNEMONICS.title: Helpful Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain 10 [blue]Memory[/blue]
|}At the end of your turn, spend 2 [blue]Memory[/blue] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL.title: Imaginary Fuel
MNEMONIST-INDUCE_PHOBIA.description: Target enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Memory:diff()} [gold]Memory[/gold] you have.
MNEMONIST-INDUCE_PHOBIA.title: Induce Phobia
MNEMONIST-INTRUSIVE_THOUGHTS.description: Whenever a [gold]Persistent[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {IntrusiveThoughtsPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-INTRUSIVE_THOUGHTS.title: Intrusive Thoughts
MNEMONIST-LETHOLOGICA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When a non-[blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-LETHOLOGICA.title: Lethologica
MNEMONIST-LOCKED_MEMORIES.description: At the start of your turn, draw {LockedMemoriesPower:diff()} cards. They are [blue]Unplayable[/blue] this turn.
MNEMONIST-LOCKED_MEMORIES.title: Locked Memories
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your hand. Gain thrice that much [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.title: Long Term Storage
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.selectionScr: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MEMENTO.description: Add [gold]Persistent[/gold] to a card in your hand.
MNEMONIST-MEMENTO.title: Memento
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION.description: At the start of your turn, shuffle an [blue]Engram[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw a card.
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION.title: Memorization
MNEMONIST-MEMORYS_JOURNEY.title: Memory's Journey
MNEMONIST-MIND_PALACE.title: Mind Palace
MNEMONIST-MISREMEMBER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff} damage.
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] during your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MISREMEMBER.title: Misremember
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain 5 [blue]Memory[/blue]
|}At the end of your turn, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to your [blue]Memory[/blue].
[blue]Memory Engrams[/blue] are shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM.title: Mnemonic Form
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST_DEFEND.title: Defend
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST_STRIKE.title: Strike
MNEMONIST-NAGGING_THOUGHT.title: Nagging Thought
MNEMONIST-OBLIVIOUS.description:
Spend all your [blue]Memory[/blue], gain twice that much [gold]Block[/gold].
For every {PerEnergy:diff()}, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
MNEMONIST-OBLIVIOUS.title: Oblivious
MNEMONIST-OBSESSIVE_THOUGHT.description: When played or exhausted, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
MNEMONIST-OBSESSIVE_THOUGHT.title: Obsessive Thought
MNEMONIST-OVERSHARE.description: Enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], plus an additional 1 for every {PerDeck:diff()} cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-OVERSHARE.title: Overshare
MNEMONIST-PERSISTENT_MEMORY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When this card is shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], increase its damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-PERSISTENT_MEMORY.title: Persistent Memory
MNEMONIST-PRIZED_MEMORIES.description:
Draw a card.
If you have {Size:diff()} or fewer cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-PRIZED_MEMORIES.title: Prized Memories
MNEMONIST-QUICK_TO_RECALL.description:
Exhaust ALL {IfUpgraded:show:your [gold]Status[/gold] cards|[gold]Status[/gold] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]}.
Gain 1 [gold]Memory[/gold] for each.
MNEMONIST-QUICK_TO_RECALL.title: Quick To Recall
MNEMONIST-RECORD_THE_MOMENT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-RECORD_THE_MOMENT.title: Record The Moment
MNEMONIST-RECURSIVE_MEMORY.title: Recursive Memory
MNEMONIST-REINTERPRET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw a card.
Reduce this card's cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
MNEMONIST-REINTERPRET.title: Reinterpret
MNEMONIST-REMINISCE.title: Reminisce
MNEMONIST-RUMINATE.description: Put the top {Mill:diff()} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. If your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] isn't empty, gain {Energy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
MNEMONIST-RUMINATE.title: Ruminate
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS.description: At the start of your turn, gain {SimpleMnemonicsPower:diff()} [gold]Memory[/gold].
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS.title: Simple Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_FORGET.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top {Mill:diff()} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_FORGET.title: Strive To Forget
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_REMEMBER.description:
Draw until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.
You can only play {StrivePower:diff()} more cards this turn.
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_REMEMBER.title: Strive To Remember
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT.description: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card this turn, draw a card.
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT.title: Train Of Thought
MNEMONIST-VENT.description:
Exhaust the bottom card of your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-VENT.title: Vent
MNEMONIST-WAVERING_FOCUS.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains 1 less [gold]Block[/gold] for every card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-WAVERING_FOCUS.title: Wavering Focus
MNEMONIST-WEIGHT_OF_MEMORY.description:
Gain {Memory:diff()} [gold]Memory[/gold].
Deal damage equal to twice your [gold]Memory[/gold]. If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently increase this card's [gold]Memory[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-WEIGHT_OF_MEMORY.title: Weight Of Memory
